title: ValidationRun
description: A stable, external-client-facing envelope describing one run of DATAGLOW's validation layers over a dataset. This is a derived contract: it is produced deterministically from the app's internal `results` map (see toValidationRun() in js/protocol/protocol-conformance.js) rather than exposing that internal map verbatim, so the wire shape stays stable even if internal layer bookkeeping changes.

protocolVersion.description: Semver of the DATAGLOW protocol this payload targets.

layers.description: Map of layer id -> layer result.

confidence.description: The Confidence Layer's 0–100 score summary, when present.

grades.description: The Confidence-Calibrated two-axis grade, when computed.

status.description: Layer outcome. "idle" means the layer did not run (not applicable / awaiting input).

detail.description: Optional structured detail; any JSON value or null.

ts.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the layer ran.
